name: MuTeLuv: Diva Deva Mata
overview: "Air Dolls" Nevia, Ingky, Fews, and Katrina are a fierce group of high school influencer divas. However, their channel's follower count isn't budging, so they turn to Goddess Dalop—known for her power to elevate influencers—for help. It works—at first. When Katrina accidentally offends the deity and ends up possessed by the goddess, Nivea, Inky, and Fuse must find a way to drive the spirit out of her body. The more they try, the more chaos comes their way.
